name: Yemen Fatah
recipeIngredient: 1 large Onion, halved lengthwise and sliced crosswise (1 heaping cup)
3/4 lb Lean lamb, cut into thin 2-inch strips
Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
1 cup Couscous, cooked according to package directions
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, heat the oil over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and garlic; sauté until the onion is translucent.
3. Add the lamb (or beef) and stir frequently, sautéing just until browned on all sides.
4. Stir in the broth, oregano, cumin, coriander, allspice, salt, and pepper.
5. Cook the mixture for a few minutes longer, or until heated through.
6. Spoon the meat mixture over hot couscous and sprinkle with parsley. Serve immediately.
